descGu: દર વખત નવા સવાલ! 1-20 random addition.
descEn: New questions every time! Random 1-20 addition.

teacherGuide.conceptGu: Random practice = fluency build. દર session નવા numbers — brain ને pattern memorize નહીં, actually calculate કરવું પડે. આ real mental maths strength!
teacherGuide.conceptEn: Random practice prevents pattern memorisation — builds real calculation fluency.
teacherGuide.storyGu: 'Yuval, computer ને random numbers generate કરવા આવડે — and so do you now! દર round different — like real life!'
teacherGuide.scriptGu: 'Ready? New numbers every time! No cheating by remembering — fresh brain every question!'
teacherGuide.tipsGu: 💡 Time him casually — 'last time 8 seconds, now?' Personal bests motivate!

questions.hintEn: Count up from the bigger number!
